message:
feat: expand conformance vectors, SDK runtime, and prelude

fcp-conformance:
  - vecgen.rs: expand vector generation with 248+ lines of additional
    enrollment and simulation scenario coverage.
  - vecgen/mod.rs: add 43 lines of new vector generation helpers.
  - tests/schema_hash_determinism.rs: new test validating CBOR schema
    hash stability across vector regeneration cycles.
  - Regenerate enrollment and simulation CBOR test vectors.

fcp-sdk:
  - runtime.rs: add 375 lines of runtime lifecycle management,
    including health check integration and graceful shutdown sequencing.
  - prelude.rs: update re-exports for new runtime APIs.

Issue tracker: sync beads state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
